scripts.start: cd openclaw && sh scripts/keys.sh && sh scripts/apply-config.sh && sh scripts/install-deps.sh && sh scripts/identity.sh && sh scripts/gateway.sh
scripts.docker:run: cd .. && docker run --rm -p 8080:8080 --env-file runtime/.env -e OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR=/app convos-runtime:local
scripts.build:run: cd .. && docker build -f runtime/openclaw/Dockerfile -t convos-runtime:local . && docker run --rm -p 8080:8080 --env-file runtime/.env -e OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR=/app convos-runtime:local
scripts.start:hermes: cd hermes && sh scripts/keys.sh && sh scripts/install-deps.sh && sh scripts/apply-config.sh && sh scripts/identity.sh && sh scripts/start.sh
scripts.build:run:hermes: cd .. && docker build -f runtime/hermes/Dockerfile -t convos-runtime-hermes:local . && docker run --rm -p 8080:8080 --env-file runtime/.env convos-runtime-hermes:local
